Justification.Explanation: LL-23 content has not been provided. Without LL-23 content, we cannot verify refinements, dependencies, or traceability (including interactions with LL-LOC-7.1). The next step is to supply LL-23.xml contents or paste its requirements so a formal findings/implementations document can be generated.

Implementation.Solution: <Requirement ID="LL-23-PLACEHOLDER-1"> <Type>FR</Type> <Name>Placeholder for LL-23 content</Name> <Relationships/> <Content>LL-23 content to be provided by you. This placeholder exists to document that LL-23 analysis cannot proceed until LL-23 content is available.</Content> </Requirement>
